quality.subtitle: Quality & Excellence
quality.description: At Three Monkeys, we believe dining should be an exceptional experience. Our commitment to quality, freshness, and hygiene ensures you can focus on enjoying your meal while we handle everything else.

fresh.title: Fresh Ingredients
fresh.description: We source only the freshest local ingredients daily from trusted local farmers and markets. Our seafood arrives fresh each morning.

chefs.title: Expert Chefs
chefs.description: Our chefs have decades of combined experience in authentic Thai cuisine. Each dish is prepared with passion and expertise.

hygiene.title: Kitchen Hygiene
hygiene.description: Our kitchen maintains the highest standards of cleanliness and food safety. Regular inspections ensure we exceed health regulations.

service.title: Attentive Service
service.description: Our staff is trained to provide exceptional service. From dietary accommodations to special occasions, we ensure every detail is perfect.

aboutPage.headline: Dining Among The Trees
aboutPage.description: Where authentic Southern Thai cuisine meets the magic of nature

story.title: A Culinary Journey Born in Nature
story.p1: Three Monkeys was born from a simple dream: to create a dining experience that connects people with nature while celebrating the rich flavors of Southern Thai cuisine.
story.p2: Nestled within Hanuman World's ancient rainforest, our restaurant offers something truly unique—the chance to dine among towering trees, with the sounds of nature as your soundtrack and the jungle canopy as your ceiling.
story.p3: Every dish we serve is a tribute to our heritage, crafted with locally-sourced ingredients and prepared with techniques passed down through generations.

farmToTable.title: Farm to Table
farmToTable.description: We source the freshest ingredients daily from local farmers and the Andaman Sea.

culinaryMastery.title: Culinary Mastery
culinaryMastery.description: Our chefs bring generations of Thai culinary wisdom to every dish we create.

natureImmersion.title: Nature Immersion
natureImmersion.description: Dine surrounded by ancient rainforest trees and breathtaking jungle views.

heartfeltService.title: Heartfelt Service
heartfeltService.description: Every guest is family. We create memories that last a lifetime.

cta.title: Ready for an Unforgettable Experience?
cta.description: Book your table and discover why Three Monkeys is Phuket's most unique dining destination

faqPage.headline: How Can We Help?
faqPage.description: Find answers to {count}+ frequently asked questions about Three Monkeys

booking.q1: How do I make a reservation?
booking.a1: You can make a reservation through our website by clicking the 'Reserve' button, calling us directly at +66 98-010-8838, or messaging us on WhatsApp. We recommend booking at least 24 hours in advance, especially for premium seats and special packages.
booking.q2: Can I modify or cancel my booking?
booking.a2: Yes, you can modify or cancel your booking up to 24 hours before your reservation time. Please contact us via phone or email with your booking reference number. Cancellations made less than 24 hours in advance may forfeit the deposit.
booking.q3: How far in advance should I book?
booking.a3: For regular seating, we recommend booking 1-2 days in advance. For premium seats (Monkey Dome, Monkey Nest) and special packages, we recommend booking at least 3-7 days ahead, especially during peak season (November-April).
booking.q4: Can we walk in without a reservation?
booking.a4: Yes, walk-ins are welcome subject to availability. However, we strongly recommend reservations, especially for dinner service and weekends. Premium seats and special packages always require advance booking.

dining.a1: We accommodate vegetarian, vegan, gluten-free, and halal dietary requirements. Please inform us of any allergies or dietary restrictions when making your reservation, and our chefs will prepare suitable alternatives.
dining.q2: What type of cuisine do you serve?
dining.a2: We specialize in authentic Southern Thai cuisine, featuring local Phuket specialties and traditional recipes. We also offer Western dishes, Japanese options, and Balinese-inspired items. Our menu caters to all tastes while highlighting local flavors.
dining.q3: Do you have a dress code?
dining.a3: We have a smart casual dress code. While we want you to be comfortable in our rainforest setting, we ask guests to avoid swimwear, sleeveless shirts for men, and overly casual attire. Comfortable shoes are recommended for navigating our outdoor areas.
dining.q4: Can children dine at the restaurant?
dining.a4: Children are welcome at Three Monkeys. We have a dedicated kids' menu and high chairs available. Our outdoor setting is family-friendly, though we recommend supervising young children around elevated seating areas.

experience.q1: How long does the dining experience take?
experience.a1: A typical dining experience lasts 2-3 hours, allowing you to enjoy our cuisine and atmosphere fully. For special packages, please allow 3-4 hours. We never rush our guests—your table is yours for the evening.
experience.q2: Can I request a specific seat or zone?
experience.a2: Yes, you can request specific seats when booking. Popular zones like Monkey Dome and Monkey Nest fill up quickly, so we recommend booking early. We'll do our best to accommodate your preferences based on availability.
experience.q3: Can I host a private event or celebration?
experience.a3: We love hosting celebrations. We offer birthday packages, romantic dinner packages, proposal setups, and can accommodate private events for up to 50 guests. Contact us to discuss your requirements and we'll create a custom experience.
experience.a4: Select packages include live entertainment such as saxophone performances, live bands, and fire shows. Our romantic dinner and ultimate packages feature private entertainment. Regular dining doesn't include live shows but features ambient jungle sounds.

packages.a1: Deposits are fully refundable if you cancel at least 24 hours before your reservation. For cancellations within 24 hours, the deposit may be forfeited. Special packages may have different cancellation policies—please check when booking.
packages.q2: What payment methods do you accept?
packages.a2: We accept cash (Thai Baht), all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express), bank transfer, and mobile payments including PromptPay. For deposits, we accept bank transfer and credit card payments online.
packages.a3: Yes, we offer gift vouchers for any amount or for specific packages. They make perfect gifts for birthdays, anniversaries, or special occasions. Contact us to purchase vouchers, valid for 12 months from issue date.
packages.q4: Do you have semi-private or private areas?
packages.a4: Yes, our Monkey Dome and Monkey Nest offer semi-private experiences. For fully private events, we can arrange exclusive use of certain zones. Zone 6 and Zone 7 can accommodate large groups seeking privacy.

location.a1: We're located inside Hanuman World, at 105 Moo 4, Muang Chao Fa Road, Wichit, Mueang Phuket, Phuket 83000. We're about 15 minutes from Phuket Town and 30 minutes from Patong Beach.
location.a2: Yes, free parking is available at Hanuman World. Follow signs to the restaurant parking area. During busy periods, our staff will guide you to available spaces. For large groups, please inform us in advance.
location.a3: While we don't provide direct transfers, we can recommend reliable taxi services and help arrange transportation. Many hotels in Phuket offer shuttle services to Hanuman World. Grab and local taxis are also readily available.
location.a4: We're open daily from 10:00 AM to 1:00 AM. Last food order is at midnight. We recommend arriving before 10 PM for the full dining experience. Kitchen hours may vary on special occasions—please check when booking.

terms.introText: By making a reservation at Three Monkeys Restaurant, you agree to be bound by these terms and conditions. Please read them carefully before completing your booking.
terms.booking1: All reservations require a deposit to secure your booking
terms.booking2: Deposits are fully redeemable against food and beverages
terms.booking3: All prices are exclusive of 7% VAT and 10% service charge
terms.bookingNote: Important: Deposits are non-refundable but can be rescheduled subject to availability
terms.cancellation2: 24-hour notice required for cancellation or amendments
terms.cancellation4: No-shows will forfeit the entire deposit
terms.cancellation5: In case of weather or unforeseen circumstances, we will work with you to find a suitable alternative date
terms.transfer1: Transfer service is available within Phuket area only
terms.transfer2: Airport pickup is excluded from transfer services
terms.transfer3: Maximum 10 passengers per van for private transfers
terms.requirements1: Valid ID may be required for age-restricted beverages
terms.requirements3: Children are welcome but must be supervised at all times
terms.requirementsNote: Special dietary requirements should be communicated at least 24 hours in advance
terms.legalText: These terms are governed by Thai law. Three Monkeys Restaurant reserves the right to modify these terms at any time. By completing a reservation, you acknowledge that you have read and understood these terms.

privacy.introText: Three Monkeys Restaurant is committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your personal information.
privacy.usage3: Improving our services and guest experience
privacy.usage4: Sending promotional offers (with your consent only)
privacy.security1: We use industry-standard encryption to protect your data
privacy.security2: Your payment information is processed securely and never stored on our servers
privacy.securityNote: We never sell or share your personal information with third parties for marketing purposes
privacy.rights1: Access your personal data held by us
privacy.rights4: Opt out of marketing communications at any time
privacy.contactText: If you have any questions about this privacy policy or wish to exercise your data rights, please contact us:
